overall.description: First-person exploration through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, moderate traffic, and towering skyscrapers. The footage from Cyberpunk 2077 shows a walk from a covered underpass through city streets to a foggy back alley filled with trash bags, ending with a view looking up at massive illuminated towers.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

events.description: moving from covered underpass toward open street intersection
approaching moving traffic on the street ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the concrete overpass toward the street intersection

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with support pillars
steam rising from grates on the wet ground
large illuminated advertisement screen showing a woman's face
traffic signal lights on metal poles

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete highway overpass with steam rising from street grates. The camera moves forward along a wet sidewalk toward an intersection, approaching moving traffic visible in the distance. A large digital billboard is visible on the right side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street intersection under elevated highway with red neon lighting

events.description: crossing the street while vehicles pass through the intersection
turning slightly right to follow the road curve along the waterfront

agents.ego_description: crossing the asphalt street while navigating through moderate traffic flow

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection with headlights on
dark vehicle approaching the intersection from the distance

entered.detail: highway underpass illuminated with red neon strip lights
curved on-ramp with directional signage for City Center
white painted lines and crosswalk markings on asphalt

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide street intersection beneath the elevated highway. The camera crosses the asphalt road while cars pass by, with a prominent red-lit underpass visible to the left. The digital billboard remains visible in the distance as the camera turns slightly to follow the road curve.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane road under overpass with waterfront view

events.description: yellow delivery truck passes by on the right side
approaching the turn back toward the city center buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along the roadside under the overpass with vehicles passing by frequently

notable_agents.action: yellow delivery truck driving past on the right
dark sedan driving along the road in the opposite direction

entered.detail: massive cylindrical support pillars for the elevated highway
illuminated billboard with purple background and product advertisement
distant view of water and horizon beyond the road barrier

segments.scene_description: Walking along the multi-lane road under the highway overpass, with massive concrete pillars lining the path. A yellow truck passes by on the right, and a purple advertisement screen is mounted on the wall. The view opens to a waterfront on the right side with distant city lights visible across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with storefronts leading to security gate

events.description: turning left to head back toward the city center buildings
entering a gated doorway into a back alley area

agents.ego_description: turning left off the main road and walking toward a building entrance with glass facade

entered.detail: modern building entrance with illuminated glass doors and windows
metal security gate with orange frame leading to back area
piles of garbage bags stacked against the building wall

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left away from the waterfront, passing a large purple advertisement screen now on the left. The path leads toward a modern glass building entrance with a security gate. Trash bags are piled against the wall on the right as the camera approaches and enters the gated doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy back alley with trash piles and towering skyscrapers overhead

events.description: entering foggy area with reduced visibility and atmospheric haze
tilting camera upward to look at the towering skyscrapers above

agents.ego_description: walking through a foggy back alley filled with trash bags and looking up at the towering neon-lit skyscrapers

entered.detail: large mounds of garbage bags and debris stacked in the alley
red neon light strip running along the ground
massive futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon signs reaching into the fog
thick atmospheric fog and haze filling the alley and surrounding air

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a narrow foggy back alley filled with mounds of trash bags. Red neon strips line the wet ground. The camera tilts upward to reveal massive towering skyscrapers with bright neon signs piercing through the thick fog, including signs for 'Oriental Bar' and 'Orbital Air' against the dark night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic depths of a concrete underpass toward an expansive urban waterfront. It begins beneath a massive highway overpass where steam rises from street grates, moving along a wet sidewalk toward a distant intersection and a glowing digital billboard. As the camera crosses the asphalt road, the scene opens into a wide intersection filled with passing cars and the glow of a red-lit underpass to the left. The path then follows the curve of the multi-lane road past towering concrete pillars and a purple advertisement screen, just as a yellow truck passes by on the right. Finally, the environment expands as the camera reaches the edge of the highway structure, revealing a waterfront with distant city lights shimmering across the water.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a brightly lit commercial area into a claustrophobic, neon-drenched urban alley. It begins by turning away from the waterfront, passing a large purple advertisement screen as the path leads toward a modern glass building entrance. As the camera approaches a security gate, it passes piles of trash bags against a wall before gliding through the gated doorway. The scene then shifts into a narrow, foggy back alley where red neon strips reflect off the wet ground and mounds of refuse line the path. Finally, the camera tilts upward to reveal massive skyscrapers with bright signs for Oriental Bar and Orbital Air piercing through the thick night fog.
